package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for validator_depends_on_repository_directly: Reusable validator code that reaches into repositories instead of receiving precomputed facts or focused services.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule218NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule218NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule218NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario218Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule218NegativeService, input Rule218NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
